basic_details.job_title: WBSETCL Head Information Technology Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: West Bengal State Electricity Transmission Company (WBSETCL)

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 55 years Age relaxation may be given in case of exceptionally qualified and deserving candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in Electrical Engineering/IT/Computer Science Engineering/Post Graduate Degree with specialization in IT/Computer Science
qualification.details: Head Information Technology (IT): Bachelor Degree in Electrical Engineering/IT/Computer Science Engineering/Post Graduate Degree with specialization in IT/Computer Science from any recognized Indian University/Institute. Experience: At least 20 years of experience in managing large IT integration projects with at least 2 years at the level of Additional Chief Engineer/ Additional General Manager or equivalent in Government Sectors/PSUs or similar reputed private sector organizations. For Private Sector Executives, the Annual Turn Over of the Company / Organisation should not be less than Rs. 1000 Crore. Should have good project management skills with minimum 5 years of experience in end-to-end SAP ERP implementation including solution, implementation/roll out and presentation to internal customers. Should also have work experience in at least 3 SAP ERP Modules out of (i) Material Management, (ii) Plant Maintenance, (iii) Project Systems, (iv) Finance & Controlling and (v) Human Capital Management. Implementation of SAP ERP in two or more organizations will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Monthly remuneration in the Pay Band: Rs.1,47,300/- - Rs.2,04,500/- with other allowances viz. Dearness Allowance as admissible. House Rent Allowance @ Rs. 16,000/- Per Month. Medical Allowance & Electricity Allowance will be admissible as per the rules of the Company. Public Relation Allowance will be admissible as per the rules of the Company.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WBSETCL Head Information Technology Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.wbsetcl.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download WBSETCL Head Information Technology Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Head Information Technology post in WBSETCL?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications along with all necessary documents and credentials is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Head Information Technology position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor Degree in Electrical Engineering/IT/Computer Science Engineering or a Post Graduate Degree with specialization in IT/Computer Science from a recognized Indian University/Institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Head Information Technology post is between 45 and 55 years. Age relaxation may be provided for exceptionally qualified candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Head Information Technology role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly remuneration in the Pay Band of Rs.1,47,300/- to Rs.2,04,500/-, along with other admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Head Information Technology post?
faq.answer: Applications can be submitted offline by sending the filled form and documents to the Director (HR & A), WBSETCL, Vidyut Bhavan, 8th Floor, A-Block, Salt Lake, Kolkata - 700091, or via email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Head Information Technology post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the post of Head Information Technology (IT) in WBSETCL.

faq.question: Q8. What kind of experience is required for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 20 years of experience in managing large IT integration projects, with at least 2 years at a senior equivalent level in government or reputed private organizations, is required. Specific SAP ERP experience is also detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection methods for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Personal Interview followed by a Pre-employment Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application format can be downloaded from the official website of WBSETCL, which is www.wbsetcl.in.
